'''竏營-th-z-p''' ('''kazathzepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quintuple|quintuple]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-th-z-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quintuple|quintuple]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏營-th-z-p
|-
! Lemma
| kazathzepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizathzepoko|thizathzepoko]] || [[word:jizathzepoko|jizathzepoko]] || [[word:shizathzepoko|shizathzepoko]] || [[word:kizathzepoko|kizathzepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzathzepoko|thuthuzathzepoko]] || [[word:jujuzathzepoko|jujuzathzepoko]] || [[word:shushuzathzepoko|shushuzathzepoko]] || [[word:kukuzathzepoko|kukuzathzepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzathzepoko|thuzathzepoko]] || [[word:juzathzepoko|juzathzepoko]] || [[word:shuzathzepoko|shuzathzepoko]] || [[word:kuzathzepoko|kuzathzepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzathzepoko|thuzathzepoko]] || [[word:juzathzepoko|juzathzepoko]] || [[word:shuzathzepoko|shuzathzepoko]] || [[word:kuzathzepoko|kuzathzepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezathzepoko|thezathzepoko]] || [[word:jezathzepoko|jezathzepoko]] || [[word:shezathzepoko|shezathzepoko]] || [[word:kezathzepoko|kezathzepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozathzepoko|thothozathzepoko]] || [[word:jojozathzepoko|jojozathzepoko]] || [[word:shoshozathzepoko|shoshozathzepoko]] || [[word:kokozathzepoko|kokozathzepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozathzepoko|thozathzepoko]] || [[word:jozathzepoko|jozathzepoko]] || [[word:shozathzepoko|shozathzepoko]] || [[word:kozathzepoko|kozathzepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozathzepoko|thozathzepoko]] || [[word:jozathzepoko|jozathzepoko]] || [[word:shozathzepoko|shozathzepoko]] || [[word:kozathzepoko|kozathzepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦzathzepoko|thﾃｦzathzepoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦzathzepoko|jﾃｦzathzepoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦzathzepoko|shﾃｦzathzepoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦzathzepoko|kﾃｦzathzepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazathzepoko|thathazathzepoko]] || [[word:jajazathzepoko|jajazathzepoko]] || [[word:shashazathzepoko|shashazathzepoko]] || [[word:kakazathzepoko|kakazathzepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazathzepoko|thazathzepoko]] || [[word:jazathzepoko|jazathzepoko]] || [[word:shazathzepoko|shazathzepoko]] || [[word:kazathzepoko|kazathzepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazathzepoko|thazathzepoko]] || [[word:jazathzepoko|jazathzepoko]] || [[word:shazathzepoko|shazathzepoko]] || [[word:kazathzepoko|kazathzepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shazathzepithi|shazathzepithi]] || [[word:shazathzepiji|shazathzepiji]] || [[word:shazathzepishi|shazathzepishi]] || [[word:shazathzepiki|shazathzepiki]]

|}
